creator: natedac@kscable.com
text:
The current version of flashplugin for Netscape will cause Netscape to 
crash when some pages are viewed.

Fix: 

Don't install the FreeBSD flashplugin, or use the Linux version of
Netscape, and the linux version of the plugin.  This combination does not
crash.  Attempting to use the Linux version of the flashplugin with 
FreeBSD netscape of course produces an error.
How-To-Repeat: 
Compile and install the Flash plugin for FreeBSD Netscape, in this case it 
will be used with Communicator 4.7.  Now visit a webpage such as 
www.cartoonnetwork.com - after a second or so as the page loads, it will 
attempt to switch to the flash version of the page, at which point 
Netscape will immediately exit with no error/crash dialogue.
